name: neo4j-mcp-workspace
description: Build and query Neo4j knowledge graphs from CSV and PDF data

neo4j_username.title: Documents DB — Username
neo4j_username.description: Neo4j username for the Documents database

neo4j_password.title: Documents DB — Password
neo4j_password.description: Neo4j password for the Documents database

neo4j_database.title: Documents DB — Database name
neo4j_database.description: Database where documents, chunks, and extracted entities live. Aura: always 'neo4j'.

neo4j_ontology_uri.title: Ontology DB — URI
neo4j_ontology_uri.description: URI for the Ontology database. On Aura each database is a separate instance with its own URI. Leave empty to reuse the Documents DB credentials (single-instance / local setup).

neo4j_ontology_username.title: Ontology DB — Username
neo4j_ontology_username.description: Leave empty to reuse the Documents DB username.

neo4j_ontology_password.title: Ontology DB — Password
neo4j_ontology_password.description: Leave empty to reuse the Documents DB password.

neo4j_ontology_database.title: Ontology DB — Database name
neo4j_ontology_database.description: Database where the ontology graph is stored (NodeType, PropertyDef, AliasMap, etc.). Aura: always 'neo4j'. Local: use a separate database name e.g. 'ontology'.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API Key
openai_api_key.description: Required for embeddings (text-embedding-3-small). Also used for extraction when extraction_model is an OpenAI model. For other LLM providers, set the key in Extra Environment Variables below.

extraction_model.title: Extraction Model (LiteLLM format)
extraction_model.description: LiteLLM model identifier. Examples: openai/gpt-5-mini, anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, ollama/llama3.2

extra_env.title: Extra Environment Variables
extra_env.description:
For non-OpenAI LLM providers. One KEY=VALUE per line.

Anthropic:  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
Azure OpenAI:  AZURE_API_KEY=...  AZURE_API_BASE=https://....openai.azure.com  AZURE_API_VERSION=2024-02-01
AWS Bedrock:  AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=...  AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=...  AWS_REGION_NAME=us-east-1
Ollama (local, no key needed):  set Extraction Model to ollama/llama3.2
